Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class AbstractSpecializationHelper

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractSpecializationHelper
Direct Known Subclasses:
SpecializationBuilder, SpecializationChecker
public abstract class AbstractSpecializationHelper extends Object
Common implementation for building and verifying specialization instances.

      private boolean isPredicateVariable(String srcImage)
      Utility method to check if a string source image is a predicate variable.
      Parameters:
      srcImage - the input source image.
      Returns:
      true if the input source image is a predicate variable.
